# TW Market Data

台股資料 API，為 AI agent、量化研究與金融產品開發設計。

Base URL: https://twmarketdata.com

Documentation:
- /docs/introduction
- /docs/quick-start
- /datasets
- /pricing

Authentication:
- API key workflow via dashboard and documented API routes.
- Access scope and limits depend on plan and rollout stage.

Key dataset groups:
- Market Prices
- Fundamentals
- Institutional Flow
- Technical Indicators
- News Intelligence (metadata-first)

AI agent notes:
- data_gaps are preserved in responses.
- coverage and freshness should be checked before downstream use.
- not investment advice.
- no trading action guidance is provided.

OpenAPI:
- /docs/openapi-spec

MCP:
- Preview / planned references are documented in /docs/tools-mcp.
- Hosted production MCP server is not announced in this file.

Support:
- /contact
- avenra.platform@gmail.com
